LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO AMEND JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR IN DEPARTMENT 302. THE MOTION SHOULD BE RE-NOTICED FOR DEPARTMENT 514, BECAUSE THE MOVING PARTY IS SEEKING TO AMEND A JUDGMENT ENTERED BY JUDGE SULLIVAN IN THAT DEPARTMENT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, CARLOS A/C CHARTERS $5,038.78 PRINCIPAL, $88.27 INTEREST, $344.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,471.05, OTHER: PURSUANT TO CVC 17151 AND 17155, THE JUDGMENT AGAINST A/C CHARTERS IS ENFORCEABLE ONLY TO THE EXTENT OF THE MINIMUM INSURANCE REQUIREMENTS AT THE TIME OF THE ACCIDENT WHICH WERE $5,000.00 FOR PROPERTY AND $15,000.00 PER PERSON TO A MAXIMUM OF $30,000.00 FOR PERSONAL INURIES. IN THIS CASE $5,000.00 IS THE AMOUNT ENFORCEABLE AGAINST A/C CHARTERS.SEE SCANNED DOC
